pr_title: SDLC-44: Fix knowledge base search to match substrings in article fields
pr_body:
## Summary
Update knowledge base search so it returns articles when the query appears anywhere in topic, title, or content, not only at the start of those fields.

## What changed
- Adjust the search logic in `backend/app/services/knowledge_service.py`
- Preserve existing API behavior while expanding matching from prefix-only to contains/substring matching
- Add regression coverage for mid-field matches and prefix matches

## Validation
- Verified search returns articles for matches in the middle of content/title/topic
- Verified prefix matches still return results
- Verified unrelated queries do not produce false positives

## Risk
Low: change is localized to backend search matching logic and should not alter the API contract.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
